debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
f : α → β
F G : Filter α
h : F ≤ G
⊢ map f F ≤ map f G

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
s hs
    -- We need to show that s is in G.map f, given that s is in F.map f.
    have h₁ : s ∈ F.map f := hs
    -- By definition of F.map f, there exists a set t in F such that s = f '' t.
    rcases h₁ with ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩
    -- Since F ≤ G, t is in G.
    have h₂ : t ∈ G := h ht
    -- Since t is in G, f '' t is in G.map f.
    exact h₂
  exact h_main
